title: Ridge-Line Watchtower Codes
strategies: Sidon / perfect-ruler layout (all pairwise differences distinct) -> ratio well below 1, reproduces the grader baseline (~0.1)
symmetric arithmetic run 0..n-1 -> |A+A| = |A-A| = 2n-1, ratio exactly 1 (a clear jump over the baseline)
more-sums-than-differences block construction: direct sum of the MSTD seed {0,2,3,4,7,11,12,14} with an arithmetic/MSTD factor, ratio 1.04-1.08 (>1)
recursive tensor (direct-sum power) of the MSTD seed to multiply the ratio for sizes that factor cleanly
local / hill-climb search over placements to push the ratio above the structured constructions
